description_long: This is a modern, four-door Ford pickup truck finished in a vibrant blue color with black accents. The vehicle features a spacious double cab, tinted windows, and a large open cargo bed at the rear, suitable for transporting goods or equipment. The front grille prominently displays the Ford logo, and the truck sits on black alloy wheels with visible wheel arches. The side mirrors, door handles, and trim are all rendered in black, contrasting with the blue body. The truck's design is robust and utilitarian, with aerodynamic lines and a slightly raised chassis for off-road capability. The rear view shows a tailgate and a license plate area, while the bed is lined for durability.
description: A blue Ford four-door pickup truck with black accents, a large cargo bed, and robust, modern styling. Features include tinted windows, black alloy wheels, and a prominent front grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold Ford grille, blue hood, and black windshield with roof details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, black wheels, and the full length of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, tailgate, and rear lights with a visible license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the double cab, black wheels, and cargo bed.
